revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初四]][[zh:六月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初四]][[zh:六月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初四]][[zh:六月初四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初四]][[zh:六月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 4|qq=June 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|qid=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}}) – A major earthquake struck the Dewa region ("出羽大Earthquake"). As a result of tectonic uplift caused by the earthquake, the lake at 【Isogata】 in Akita transformed into land. * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1811|en|1811|qid=Q6928|lt=1811|1=1811}} {{ill|July 23|en|July 23|qid=Q2722|lt=July 23|1=July 23}}) – While surveying the island of 【Kunashiri】, the Russian captain Gorounin was captured by the Matsumae magistrate and confined in Hakodate; in the following year, Takadaya Kabehei was later exchanged and released after drifting ashore in Russia. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}}) – A Tosa fisherman named Manjirō, who was shipwrecked during his work, was rescued by an American whaling vessel.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1596|en|1596|qid=Q6785|lt=1596|1=1596}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Go-Suiyo Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}}, the 108th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1680|en|1680|qid=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}}). * {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1621|en|1621|qid=Q6812|lt=1621|1=1621}} {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22|1=July 22}}) – {{ill|Kinoshita Jun'an|en|Kinoshita Jun'an|qid=Q6562432|lt=Kinoshita Jūan|1=Kinoshita Jun'an}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1699|en|1699|qid=Q7710|lt=1699|1=1699}}). * [[:en:Kōwa|Kōwa]] 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}}) – {{ill|Tsubaki Chinzan|en|Tsubaki Chinzan|qid=Q3541614|lt=Tsubakibayashi Ryokushin|1=Tsubaki Chinzan}}, a painter (died {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}}) – {{ill|Onoe Kikugorō V|en|Onoe Kikugorō V|qid=Q7094448|lt=Onoe Kikugorō (5th)|1=Onoe Kikugorō V}}, a kabuki actor (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857|1=1857}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}}) – {{ill|Gotō Shinpei|en|Gotō Shinpei|qid=Q562492|lt=Gotō Shinpei|1=Gotō Shinpei}}, a statesman who served as Home Minister, Foreign Minister, and Minister of Communications (died {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|July 12|en|July 12|qid=Q2688|lt=July 12|1=July 12}}) – {{ill|Fusanosuke Kuhara|en|Fusanosuke Kuhara|qid=Q5509880|lt=Kuhara Fusanosuke|1=Fusanosuke Kuhara}}, a businessperson and the founder of Hitachi (died {{ill|1965|en|1965|qid=Q2650|lt=1965|1=1965}}).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kōnin|Kōnin]] 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1075|en|1075|qid=Q19439|lt=1075|1=1075}} {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|en|Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|qid=Q3082851|lt=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi|1=Minamoto no Yoriyoshi}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born {{ill|988|en|988|qid=Q23475|lt=988|1=988}}). * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|qid=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|qid=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}}, the 2nd shōgun of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1182|en|1182|qid=Q19708|lt=1182|1=1182}}). * {{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|qid=Q398996|lt=Shōwa|1=Shōwa}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1315|en|1315|qid=Q5742|lt=1315|1=1315}} {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}}) – {{ill|Hōjō Hirotoki|en|Hōjō Hirotoki|qid=Q2331538|lt=Hōjō Mitsuki|1=Hōjō Hirotoki}}, the 12th Shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (born {{ill|1279|en|1279|qid=Q5534|lt=1279|1=1279}}). * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|qid=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657|1=1657}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – {{ill|Banzuiin Chōbē|en|Banzuiin Chōbē|qid=Q4857401|lt=Hattatsuiin Chōbei|1=Banzuiin Chōbē}}, a gangster of Edo (born {{ill|1622|en|1622|qid=Q6815|lt=1622|1=1622}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}}) – {{ill|Ichigawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichigawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher (born {{ill|1779|en|1779|qid=Q7714|lt=1779|1=1779}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|3|6|5|5|4|7|6|0604|qq=}}
